Brian Johnsrud, Esq. 650-600-5310 bjohnsrud@chjllp.com of Culrey Hurtgen & Johnsrud LLP for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. Counsel for Plaintiff argues, requests for an evidentiary hearing. Defendant responds.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT RAJEEV BHALLA, NICOLE LAFLAMME, JUUL LABS, INC.'s Petition To Compel Arbitration.

Taken Under Submission*. The Court will prepare an order. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)
